statements.sql: select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` in (1) and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (1) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'
select count(`receptions`.`id`) as aggregate from `receptions` where `receptions`.`updated_at` between '2026-04-01 00:00:00' and '2026-04-17 23:59:59'

select count(*) as aggregate from `reception_details` where `reception_id` in (select `receptions`.`id` from `receptions` where `receptions`.`updated_at` between '2026-04-01 00:00:00' and '2026-04-17 23:59:59')

select count(*) as aggregate from (select DATE(r.updated_at) as date, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) as records_count, COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(rd.product_code, rd.product_name)) as products_count, COUNT(DISTINCT r.area) as areas_count, COALESCE(SUM(rd.product_quantity), 0) as total_quantity, COUNT(rd.id) as total_packages from `receptions` as `r` left join `reception_details` as `rd` on `rd`.`reception_id` = `r`.`id` where `r`.`updated_at` between '2026-04-01 00:00:00' and '2026-04-17 23:59:59' group by DATE(r.updated_at)) as `aggregate_table`
